name: Dante Sparda [✠] DMC5
description:
Slow dancing to a juke box playing old hits is probably the best date ever.

Not once has a lover or date or anything been mentioned in Dante's lore, so I headcannon he's low key high key lonely later on and has no clue how to court someone.

Fluff, my heart!! Kinda rambled though,,,

Song Inspo:

🎶As The World Falls Down by David Bowie🎶(imagine this is the song playing)

🎶Just The Two Of Us by Grover Washington Jr. Feat. Bill Withers🎶

🎶Head Over Heels by Tears for Fears🎶

🎶Heaven Knows I'm Miserable Now by The Smiths🎶
creator: Lovely_Me
